text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The G1 JBC Classic is a mixed-year race featuring
racers in their classic and senior years. It's
regarded as the top race on dirt in the regionals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the first half of the G1 season runs from
October to December, racers in their classic year
are still learning and improving, leaving them at a
slight disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still a significant gap between Copano
Rickey and her seniors, Hokko Tarumae and
Wonder Acute. I'd hoped our race would be in
December, but no such luck.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's still a bit early for me to take this on.
The race is being held in the northeast, and my
compass is telling me it won't be easy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I think it's important to experience the higher
levels. Besides, while it might seem like I don't
stand a chance...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The qi has not yet swollen to its peak. We're in
the nineteenth solar term—the onset of winter.
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae and Acute are conserving their energy
for December. That's the read I'm getting.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We should compete for the sake of it, without
worrying about winning or losing. Don't you think
so, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You're right. Let's give it a go.
You're right. Let's give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the fledgling Azure Dragon, traveling from
the east of the trigrams, finally enters the core of
the dazzling star.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We won't know how well she'll stack up against
her two formidable opponents until she gets out
there and tries it.
